summary: Iter65 verified end-to-end: TwoPaths rename (Asset Acquisition / Asset Optimization with exact title+line copy), canonical type scale classes applied (.ts-h1 on landing Hero + pricing-headline, .ts-h2 on landing-paths-headline + portfolio-assets-headline, .ts-kicker on portfolio-kicker + dashboard-kicker), global palette swap to zinc-50 #FAFAFA bg + electric ultramarine #0F52FF accents on all six routes (/, /invest, /operate, /portfolio/demo, /market-trends, /pricing) — no warm parchment or olive remains visible. Portfolio rebuilt minimal: massive €1.7M H1 + green +€41K upside pill + 4-cell KPI strip (Assets=4 / AvgScore=78 / AnnualRevenue=€160K / Upside=€41K) + 4 clean single-line asset rows. Market Trends LIVE refresh fully functional: green pulsing LIVE pill + 'Updated Xs ago' timestamp + refresh button. Verified via page.route() that GET /api/dashboard/news fires (a) on mount, (b) on manual button click (hits went 2→3 with spinner), and (c) auto-poll fires at ~30.8s after mount without user interaction (final timeline: [0.8, 0.8, 4.6, 30.8]). Backend pytest 6/6 green: news endpoint 200 + items[] + strict crime filter holds (no murder/homicide/arrested/stabbed/assault), competition 200, /payments/checkout 200 for tier=analyze and tier=pro (Stripe stub), /location/analyze no 500. No console pageerrors on any of /pricing /invest /operate /invest/asset/demo. Nav is unified light shell (transparent bg) on every route.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED by testing agent: /app/frontend/src/App.css line 3 still hard-coded legacy `background: #F7F4EF;` despite the iter65 palette swap — flipped to #FAFAFA to remove the last legacy hex from the bundle. The rule was already visually overridden (body bg was already rgb(250,250,250) everywhere), but the dead declaration caused the legacy-hex grep to keep returning 1 match across every route. Now zero legacy palette hexes remain in src/.

DashboardHome.jsx fetchData fires both /api/dashboard/news AND /api/dashboard/competition in parallel — confirmed correct via page.route intercept. Initial mount fires 2 requests at ~0.8s each (React.StrictMode dev double-mount produces 2 news hits; harmless and dev-only). Auto-poll cleanly fires at exactly 30s after mount as expected.

Portfolio.jsx hero number uses inline `fontSize: clamp(48px, 7vw, 96px)` which overrides the .ts-h1 canonical clamp(40px,5vw,64px). Intentional per design blueprint ('massive H1') but worth noting the canonical scale isn't quite uniform when the page-specific override is applied — UX-wise the page reads well at €1.7M.
server.py still ~4500 lines (carryover code-review note from iter62-64) — modular split still recommended for long-term maintainability but unrelated to iter65 mandate.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 5 iter65 mandates verified across all 6 routes

test_credentials: None — all routes tested via public demo paths; no auth needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter65 design refresh fully verified. Key testids stable: TwoPaths uses landing-path-{invest|operate}-{kicker|title|line|cta}. Portfolio uses portfolio-{page|kicker|hero-value|uplift-pill|subtitle|analyze-new-btn|kpi-strip|assets|assets-headline} + kpi-{assets|avg-score|total-rev|upside} + portfolio-asset-card-{id}. Market Trends uses dashboard-{home|kicker|live-pill|last-updated|refresh-btn|refresh-control|summary|headline-story|news} + dashboard-news-card-{i}. The 30s auto-poll loop is real — intercept GET /api/dashboard/news via page.route() and wait ≥31s after mount to see the next hit. Manual refresh button click triggers an immediate fresh request and spins the icon (CSS animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite while refreshing=true). Palette is now zinc-50 #FAFAFA bg + electric ultramarine #0F52FF accent + #09090B/#52525B text + #E4E4E7 borders; status pills are emerald #10B981 / amber #F59E0B / red #EF4444. Fixed App.css legacy #F7F4EF → #FAFAFA. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter65_regression.py covers news+competition+checkout(analyze,pro)+location.
rca of the issue: N/A — iter65 5-task design refresh (TwoPaths rename + type scale + zinc-50/electric-ultramarine palette + Portfolio minimalism + Market Trends LIVE) cleanly verified. One trivial cleanup: dead `background: #F7F4EF` in /app/frontend/src/App.css was missed by the bulk sed swap; fixed in-place by testing agent.
